title: ficus euomphala
intro: Ficus euomphala, also known as the Indian banyan, is a type of fig tree native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Ficus euomphala is typically used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
